Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Report On Status Of Administration And Petition For Continuance Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espy Silverman for Michael Murphy (Executor).

Ms. Espy stated that she received an e-mail from her Client stating that he is following up on some annuities, that he has documentation showing that there may be more that he was aware of and that he wants to present some art work to the Beneficiaries so that they can bid on it. In addition, Ms. Espy stated that she has a Petition for Final Distribution almost completed but that she did not receive the bank statements from her Client, and requested a three month continuance. The Court directed Counsel to inform her Client that if the Estate is not closed in a reasonable amount of time, that the Court can consider removing him. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution was continued to April 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for one last time.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
